entry.value:
{"currentConversationId":"99e430d9-530f-4d0f-84db-cf980eff6d71","agentExecutionMode":"auto","isPanelCollapsed":true,"displayedAnnouncements":[],"conversations":{"99e430d9-530f-4d0f-84db-cf980eff6d71":{"id":"99e430d9-530f-4d0f-84db-cf980eff6d71","name":"
XMySQL Server Overview and Roadmap
","createdAtIso":"2025-10-27T13:55:37.703Z","lastInteractedAtIso":"2025-10-29T04:02:10.487Z","chatHistory":[{"request_id":"5fed5f5c-c95d-4ac2-8283-dac666e92e73","uuid":"0246da86-77c3-4714-a63b-48d418ca109b","chatItemType":"agentic-checkpoint-delimiter","status":"success","fromTimestamp":0,"toTimestamp":1761573337705,"seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"1681ec65-bb20-4f74-aaa8-a88f15cc119a","timestamp":"2025-10-27T13:55:56.419Z","request_message":"总结下这个项目","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"bec7933b-89b1-46d4-aa70-4d60b9fd3806","timestamp":"2025-10-27T13:56:26.900Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"7f27f613-b3a4-4f5f-bb94-928459a84159","timestamp":"2025-10-27T13:56:46.536Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"f26dda0b-a4d1-4ef9-95ee-e8ec2556690c","timestamp":"2025-10-27T13:59:44.062Z","request_message":"你把README.md里更新掉。说清楚架构，然后说清楚不同模块的完成实际情况，还有什么没实现，然后给出未实现任务列表。","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"c2691e78-df82-426c-919d-92f985a71696","timestamp":"2025-10-27T14:02:00.118Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"request_id":"63b93b43-9998-4a54-8359-dc1a3568b47e","uuid":"dc533969-1063-405c-8639-951f8a53c7f4","chatItemType":"agentic-checkpoint-delimiter","status":"success","fromTimestamp":1761573337705,"toTimestamp":1761573738514,"seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"10d4700f-e0c0-4aef-8e20-1209fc8a4726","timestamp":"2025-10-27T14:08:32.567Z","request_message":"用新的模块完成度表替换原“项目进度”板块；

<supervisor>
Conversation history between Agent(you) and the user and history of tool calls was abridged and summarized to reduce context size.
Abridged conversation history:
<abridged_history>
<user>
总结下这个项目
</user>
<agent_actions>
	<files_viewed>
		.
		docs/ROADMAP_README.md
		go.mod
		IMPLEMENTATION_SUMMARY.md
		main.go
		PROJECT_STATUS_AND_NEXT_STEPS.md
		README.md
		STORAGE_ENGINE_FINAL_REPORT.md
	</files_viewed>
</agent_actions>
<agent_response>
## 项目概览
- 名称与定位: XMySQL Server —— 使用 Go 从零实现的 MySQL 兼容数据库服务器
- 目标能力: 完整 MySQL 协议、SQL 解析与执行、InnoDB 风格存储引擎、查询优化器、事务/MVCC、B+ 树索引、缓冲池、Redo/Undo 日志
- 运行入口: 根目录 main.go，支持通过 my.ini 进行配置，命令行可指定配置路径、初始化等

````go path=go.mod mode=EXCERPT
module github.com/zhukovaskychina/xmysql-server
go 1.13
````

````go path=main.go mode=EXCERPT
mysqlServer := net.NewMySQLServer(config)
mysqlServer.Start()
````

## 核心模块与职责
- server/net: 网络与连接层（基于 Getty），握手、认证、会话、心跳、连接池
- server/protocol: MySQL 协议编解码与包处理（兼容 5.7+ 的主要命令）
- server/dispatcher: SQL 分发与路由（对接引擎）
- server/innodb:
 - engine: 火山模型执行器，DML/DDL 执行
 - manager: 存储/缓冲池/Schema/索引/事务/MVCC/锁等管理器
 - storage: 页/区/段/表空间、BLOB、压缩、校验等底层存储实现与包装器
 - sqlparser: yacc 语法、AST、解析器
 - plan: 统计与代价模型、优化器框架
- server/auth: 认证集成测试与认证逻辑
- server/common/conf: 常量类型与配置系统
- util: 缓冲区/文件/哈希/密码/时间等通用工具
- client 与 jdbc_client: Go/Java 客户端与示例，辅助集成与测试
- cmd: 大量 demo/test 程序（B+树、缓冲池、优化器、执行器、协议、集成测试等）

## 当前能力与完成度（按文档口径）
- 总体进度: README 标注约 85%
- 存储引擎核心: 专项报告评估约 98%（P0 完成度 100%，完成了页面/表空...sertions/testify 等
- 语言与版本: go.mod 标注 Go 1.13；部分文档建议升级（例如 atomic 特性在 1.19+ 更便利）

## 测试与质量
- 测试覆盖: README 声称 100+ 测试文件、覆盖率约 65%，含单元/集成/基准测试
- 重点测试: 协议、执行器、存储（持久化、页/文件/分配等）、认证集成与引擎集成
- 性能基准: 提供基准与并发测试入口，具体压测与指标仍在完善

## 目录结构（简述）
- 根: main.go、README、go.mod、构建脚本、配置样例
- server: 核心服务端实现（net/protocol/dispatcher/innodb/...）
- cmd: 演示与测试子命令
- client/jdbc_client: Go/Java 侧客户端与示例
- conf: 默认配置与示例 my.ini/log.xml/config.yml
- util/logger: 通用工具与日志初始化
- docs: 架构与实现文档集合
- redo/undo: 日志目录（演示/开发用途）

## 构建与运行（简述）
- 依赖: Go 1.13+（建议更高版本以便使用更丰富原子/工具特性）
- 构建: go build -o xmysql-server .
- 配置: 参考 conf/my.ini 或 README 示例
- 运行: ./xmysql-server [-configPath=./my.ini] [-initialize] [-debug]
- 连接: 使用 MySQL 客户端直连 127.0.0.1:3308

## 推荐的下一步
- 快速了解: 先读 README.md → docs/ROADMAP_README.md
- 本地体验: 构建运行 + 使用 mysql 客户端连接做基本 DDL/DML
- 深入模块: 从 server/innodb/{manager,storage,engine} 与 server/net/protocol 切入
- 若参与开发: 优先补齐测试（单测+集成+基准），再按路线图挑选高优先级任务（如事务/MVCC/恢复与优化器）

如果你想要我按“使用者角度”写一份更短的上手指南或按“新贡献者角度”给出首周学习与提交计划，我可以基于上述结构再浓缩一版。

</agent_response>

<user>
你把README.md里更新掉。说清楚架构，然后说清楚不同模块的完成实际情况，还有什么没实现，然后给出未实现任务列表。
</user>
<agent_actions>
	<files_modified>
		README.md
	</files_modified>
</agent_actions>
<agent_response>
## 已更新 README.md

我已在 README.md 第 39 行后插入了一个全新小节“架构与模块完成度（2025-10-27 更新）”，明确说明了：
- 架构总览（分层与职责）
- 各模块实际完成度与简要说明
- 按模块归纳的“尚未实现/待补充”列表
- 汇总的“未实现任务列表”（含 STG 系列和跨模块的未完项）

下面是插入内容的开头节选：

````markdown path=README.md mode=EXCERPT
## 架构与模块完成度（2025-10-27 更新）

总体评估：整体完成度约 85%；其中存储引擎核心模块按专项报告已达约 98%（P0 任务全部完成）。本节对架构、模块完成度、未实现内容与任务清单做一次最新汇总。
````

如需我进一步：
- 用新的模块完成度表替换原“项目进度”板块；
- 调整目录（目录条目）以包含新小节；
- 把“未实现任务列表”链接到对应的文档或源文件位置；

请告诉我你的偏好，我可以继续优化排版与位置。

</agent_response>

<user>
用新的模块完成度表替换原“项目进度”板块；
调整目录（目录条目）以包含新小节；
把“未实现任务列表”链接到对应的文档或源文件位置；，优化排版和位置
</user>
<agent_actions>
	<files_viewed>
		docs/DEVELOPMENT_ROADMAP_TASKS.md
		docs/QUERY_ENGINE_ANALYSIS.md
		docs/TASKS_SUMMARY.md

		server/innodb/buffer_pool
		server/innodb/engine
		server/innodb/manager

		server/innodb/storage
		server/innodb/storage/wrapper/page
		... 4 more files

</agent_actions>
<agent_continues/>

</abridged_history>

Summary was generated by Agent(you) so 'I' in the summary represents Agent(you).
Here is the summary:
<summary>
# Conversation Summary

## 1. Previous Conversation

The user requested a summary of the XMySQL Server project. I provided a comprehensive overview covering:
- Project identity and goals (MySQL-compatible database server written in Go)
- Core modules and their responsibilities (network, protocol, dispatcher, InnoDB engine, storage, etc.)
- Current capabilities and completion status (~85% overall)
- Documentation structure and roadmap
- Dependencies and technical stack
- Testing coverage and quality metrics
- Build and run instructions

The user then requested specific updates to the README.md file with three requirements:
1. Update the README with clear architecture explanation
2. Report actual module completion status
3. List what's not implemented yet
4. Provide an unimplemented task list with links to relevant documentation

## 2. Current Work

I successfully inserted a new section " 架构与模块完成度（2025-10-27 更新）" into README.md at line 40 (after line 39). This section includes:

- **Architecture Overview**: Layered breakdown (Application → Network → Protocol → SQL Dispatcher → Engine/Storage → Common/Config → Client/Tools)
- **Module Completion Table**: 10 modules with actual completion percentages and explanations
- **Unimplemented/Pending Items**: Organized by module (Protocol/Network, SQL Parsing, Storage Engine, Transactions, Logs, Optimizer, Operations)
- **Consolidated Unimplemented Task List**: Including STG series tasks and cross-module items
- **Reference to detailed roadmap documents**: Links to DEVELOPMENT_ROADMAP_TASKS.md and TASKS_SUMMARY.md

The user then requested three additional improvements:
1. Replace the original "项目进度" section with the new module completion table
2. Update the table of contents to include the new section
3. Add links to the unimplemented task list pointing to corresponding documentation/source files
4. Optimize layout and positioning

## 3. Key Technical Concepts

- **XMySQL Server**: Go-based MySQL-compatible database server
- **Architecture Layers**: Application → Network (Getty) → Protocol → Dispatcher → InnoDB Engine → Storage
- **Storage Engine Components**: 
 - Pages/Extents/Segments/Tablespaces
 - Compact/Dynamic row formats
 - BLOB management
 - Compression (ZLIB/LZ4/ZSTD)
 - Checksums (CRC32/CRC32C)
- **Transaction Management**: MVCC, ReadView, Gap locks, Next-Key locks
- **Logging**: Redo/Undo logs, WAL, LSN management, checkpoints
- **Query Processing**: Volcano model executor, fire山模型, cost-based optimizer (CBO), rule-based optimizer (RBO)
- **Indexing**: B+ tree, clustered/secondary indexes, index pushdown, covering indexes
- **Buffer Pool**: LRU strategy, prefetching, dirty page management
- **Go Version**: 1.13+ (go.mod), though some features benefit from 1.19+
- **Network Framework**: Getty for high-performance networking
- **Module Completion Metrics**: Ranging from ~55% (Query Optimizer) to ~98% (Storage Engine Core)

## 4. Relevant Files and Code

- **README.md** (Primary file being edited)
 - Line 15-29: Table of contents section
 - Line 41-114: Newly inserted " 架构与模块完成度（2025-10-27 更新）" section
 - Line 115+: Original " 项目进度" section (needs to be replaced)
 - Contains comprehensive project documentation including architecture, features, roadmap, configuration, testing

- **STORAGE_ENGINE_FINAL_REPORT.md**
 - Documents storage engine completion at 98%
 - Lists STG-002, STG-004, STG-008, STG-009, STG-010, STG-014, STG-017, STG-019 as unimplemented tasks
 - Contains detailed technical implementation of 11 completed storage features

- **docs/DEVELOPMENT_ROADMAP_TASKS.md** (785 lines)
 - Comprehensive task breakdown: 114 tasks total
 - P0: 37 tasks (90-120 person-days)
 - P1: 67 tasks (95-130 person-days)
 - P2: 10 tasks (18-22 person-days)
 - Organized by 8 modules with detailed task descriptions

- **docs/TASKS_SUMMARY.md** (300 lines)
 - Quick reference version of roadmap
 - 16-week development plan
 - Critical path analysis
 - Risk assessment

- **docs/QUERY_ENGINE_ANALYSIS.md**
 - Documents query engine gaps and missing features
 - Lists specific TODO items in optimizer code

- **Key Source Directories Identified**:
 - `server/innodb/manager/`: Storage, buffer pool, schema, index, transaction, MVCC, lock managers
 - `server/innodb/storage/wrapper/`: Page, space, BLOB wrappers
 - `server/innodb/record/`: Compact/Dynamic format handlers
 - `server/innodb/engine/`: Executors (DML, volcano model, storage-integrated)
 - `server/net/`: Network layer (Getty-based)
 - `server/protocol/`: MySQL protocol implementation

## 5. Problem Solving

**Initial Request**: User wanted a clear project summary.
**Solution**: Provided comprehensive overview of architecture, modules, completion status, and documentation structure.

**Second Request**: User wanted README.md updated with architecture clarity, actual completion status, and unimplemented task list.
**Solution**: Successfully inserted new section at line 40 with all requested information, including:
- Clear layered architecture description
- Accurate module completion table (10 modules)
- Categorized unimplemented features
- Consolidated task list with references to detailed documentation

**Current Challenge**: Need to complete the README.md optimization by:
1. Replacing the old "项目进度" section (starting at line 115) with reference to the new section
2. Updating table of contents to include the new section link
3. Adding hyperlinks in the unimplemented task list to point to specific source files and documentation

## 6. Pending Tasks and Next Steps

### Task 1: Replace Original "项目进度" Section
**User Request Quote**: "用新的模块完成度表替换原"项目进度"板块"

**Next Steps**:
- Locate the original " 项目进度" section (starts at line 115)
- Determine its end boundary (likely before "## ✨ 核心特性" at line 193)
- Replace it with a brief reference pointing readers to the new " 架构与模块完成度" section above
- Preserve any unique content if necessary

### Task 2: Update Table of Contents
**User Request Quote**: "调整目录（目录条目）以包含新小节"

**Next Steps**:
- Modify lines 15-29 (the "## 目录" section)
- Add entry for "架构与模块完成度" or similar
- Ensure proper anchor link format: `- [架构与模块完成度](#架构与模块完成度2025-10-27-更新)`
- Consider reordering to place it prominently (likely after "项目介绍" and before or replacing "项目进度")

### Task 3: Add Links to Unimplemented Task List
**User Request Quote**: "把"未实现任务列表"链接到对应的文档或源文件位置"

**Next Steps**:
- In the "未实现任务列表（汇总）" section (lines 97-112), add markdown links:
 - STG tasks → link to `STORAGE_ENGINE_FINAL_REPORT.md` (already referenced in line 98)
 - Protocol/Network tasks → link to relevant files in `server/net/` and `server/protocol/`
 - Query execution tasks → link to `server/innodb/engine/` files
 - Transaction/MVCC/Lock tasks → link to `server/innodb/manager/transaction_manager.go`, `lock_manager.go`, `mvcc_manager.go`
 - Log/Recovery tasks → link to `server/innodb/manager/redo_log_manager.go`, `undo_log_manager.go`
 - Optimizer tasks → link to `docs/QUERY_ENGINE_ANALYSIS.md` and `server/innodb/plan/`
 - Operations/Ecosystem tasks → link to `docs/DEVELOPMENT_ROADMAP_TASKS.md`

### Task 4: Optimize Layout and Positioning
**User Request Quote**: "优化排版和位置"

**Next Steps**:
- Review overall flow and readability
- Ensure consistent formatting (bullet points, indentation, spacing)
- Verify that the new section is positioned optimally (currently at line 41, right after "项目介绍")
- Consider if any content should be moved or consolidated for better user experience
- Ensure all markdown syntax is correct and renders properly

</summary>

I will continue the conversation from this point."},{"id":1,"type":5,"content":"","tool_use":{"tool_use_id":"call_utYkNyMR4V6tnTyECUKyDEQg","tool_name":"view","input_json":"{"type": "file", "path": "README.md", "view_range": [115, 192]}","mcp_server_name":"","mcp_tool_name":""}}],"status":"success","seen_state":"seen","timestamp":"2025-10-27T14:14:26.464Z"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"1de9337a-37a4-48ac-890c-039f642da449","timestamp":"2025-10-27T14:11:07.829Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"c9e23c86-63f0-4255-9a73-7680818507c3","timestamp":"2025-10-27T14:12:12.829Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"71cab4d0-4049-4e96-bc7e-d5c686928d47","timestamp":"2025-10-27T14:12:26.987Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"289ff8ef-4ff5-45a8-b6f6-1ec01e940121","timestamp":"2025-10-27T14:12:44.567Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"3c2ef21b-1ef2-4b5e-81e8-b3a567f9f81b","timestamp":"2025-10-27T14:12:53.580Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"93187cae-cba7-44c2-b105-9bf0cd973cce","timestamp":"2025-10-27T14:13:07.765Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"89a6a111-dcd5-4f6e-ab08-16e6bacfee3f","timestamp":"2025-10-27T14:13:27.345Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"69947e9d-b2bc-42b7-ac53-a26447a462d2","timestamp":"2025-10-27T14:14:51.693Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"85ccb177-56e0-427e-890e-c66af3f43e8e","timestamp":"2025-10-27T14:15:00.089Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"aee5d8ae-b718-4279-ae3a-e406bd5aa2b8","timestamp":"2025-10-27T14:15:05.815Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"bd251b1a-f850-4ef2-af2e-cc316ec43cc7","timestamp":"2025-10-27T14:15:14.198Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"dcf42d7e-885c-4056-84df-a99e4819a111","timestamp":"2025-10-27T14:15:20.195Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"9b497e2e-c379-4f99-849d-5ed47a2c23f1","timestamp":"2025-10-27T14:15:26.857Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"39798c1e-e0c8-4218-aa68-c4e9e94bbf1b","timestamp":"2025-10-27T14:15:35.288Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"request_id":"66275152-9a60-4e0b-a944-f054d583e147","uuid":"b9759262-4cb4-41a2-9971-8e46605d59d3","chatItemType":"agentic-checkpoint-delimiter","status":"success","fromTimestamp":1761573738514,"toTimestamp":1761574586761,"seen_state":"unseen"},{"request_id":"a2b4df4e-8ab3-49c3-95ff-3e0baba16c06","status":"cancelled","chatItemType":"agentic-turn-delimiter"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"575ead9b-346c-43d9-8893-d9c6a6dca11b","timestamp":"2025-10-29T04:00:07.296Z","request_message":"Fix the following Go compilation errors in the server/innodb/manager package:

**Type Redeclaration Errors:**
1. `TransactionInfo` is declared in both `mvcc_manager.go:45` and `crash_recovery.go:41` - consolidate into a single declaration, preferably in a shared types file or keep in one location and remove from the other
2. `CompressionStats` is declared in both `redo_log_compression.go:35` and `compression_manager.go:37` - consolidate into a single declaration
3. `PagesPerExtent` constant is declared in both `segment_manager.go:74` and `page_allocator.go:44` - move to a shared constants file or keep in one location only
4. `PAGE_SIZE` constant is declared in both `system_page_initializer.go:31` and `buffer_pool_manager.go:15` - consolidate into a single declaration

**Unused Variable Errors:**
5. `mergedWith` variable declared but not used in `btree_merge.go:300` - either use it or remove the declaration
6. `currentLSN` variable declared but not used in `crash_recovery.go:113` - either use it or remove the declaration

**Atomic Operation Errors (Go 1.13 compatibility issues):**
7. In `enhanced_btree_index.go` at lines 100, 129, 166, and 209: the expression `!atomic.LoadUint32(&idx.isLoaded)` is invalid because the `!` operator cannot be applied directly to uint32 values. Fix by comparing to zero: `atomic.LoadUint32(&idx.isLoaded) == 0`

Note: The project uses Go 1.13 according to go.mod, which doesn't have the newer atomic.Bool type. Use the comparison pattern `atomic.LoadUint32(&variable) == 0` instead of `!atomic.LoadUint32(&variable)`.

Please fix all these errors to make the code compile successfully.","status":"failed","seen_state":"unseen"}],"feedbackStates":{"temp-fe-6517747c-7787-4798-89c0-21fdf0ad7249":{"selectedRating":0,"feedbackNote":""},"temp-fe-ed8c7181-41c5-4d2a-85b5-3822b283484c":{"selectedRating":0,"feedbackNote":""},"temp-fe-7229144e-1f91-4bb1-93dc-fdebe691207e":{"selectedRating":0,"feedbackNote":""},"temp-fe-91670a58-fcf2-4a0f-b42f-fe98aad8f770":{"selectedRating":0,"feedbackNote":""},"temp-fe-279379e0-d96f-4ec5-bb07-8f378779c87d":{"selectedRating":0,"feedbackNote":""},"temp-fe-adef2f8d-a42a-4f23-bff0-0f3424149659":{"selectedRating":0,"feedbackNote":""},"temp-fe-a639fffb-ba4c-4189-b0e6-f51ff2060f51":{"selectedRating":0,"feedbackNote":""},"temp-fe-6d80fc72-e114-4acd-a3f9-be2dfbf1dd9d":{"selectedRating":0,"feedbackNote":""},"temp-fe-ee6fadc2-4970-4d6a-985b-9478a2f77806":{"selectedRating":0,"feedbackNote":""},"temp-fe-3c22128a-2d27-473e-b3c6-6e61b9167c3b":{"selectedRating":0,"feedbackNote":""},"temp-fe-cac96f93-a387-4fff-9e28-4fe5441ae7fb":{"selectedRating":0,"feedbackNote":""},"temp-fe-1bc9a6b3-ad72-4162-98a1-6d1e29902c6a":{"selectedRating":0,"feedbackNote":""},"temp-fe-87e0e5aa-35d0-4c0d-91b2-5fc91351312b":{"selectedRating":0,"feedbackNote":""},"temp-fe-20319d7d-b22c-43c9-a373-b014681187d8":{"selectedRating":0,"feedbackNote":""},"temp-fe-b78f549d-52b8-4d51-b13b-772e2e1ace29":{"selectedRating":0,"feedbackNote":""},"temp-fe-a2a29441-cee5-487f-839f-b62c31775630":{"selectedRating":0,"feedbackNote":""},"temp-fe-a05305ae-b86e-4f78-9164-03d002034671":{"selectedRating":0,"feedbackNote":""},"temp-fe-6c0ea5c0-4db3-4789-8add-65c33e2afd32":{"selectedRating":0,"feedbackNote":""},"temp-fe-576bd838-8b90-45ab-97bd-7b8c69254173":{"selectedRating":0,"feedbackNote":""},"temp-fe-953a82a9-851c-4a3c-a165-bcdc3d6f09bb":{"selectedRating":0,"feedbackNote":""},"temp-fe-20c03c55-0f7b-4119-9b91-16f0a4a57c89":{"selectedRating":0,"feedbackNote":""},"temp-fe-27a3e77d-a0f9-4bd5-b610-5926c2a085c1":{"selectedRating":0,"feedbackNote":""},"temp-fe-bed9634a-eeb6-440d-84c3-
